debug_info.goal:
case cons
α : Type u_1
l1✝ l2✝ : List α
x : α
l₁✝ l₂✝ : List α
l1 : l₁✝.Perm l₂✝
l2 :
  ∀ {idx1 : Fin l₁✝.length} {idx2 : Fin l₂✝.length},
    l₁✝[idx1] = l₂✝[idx2] → (l₁✝.eraseIdx ↑idx1).Perm (l₂✝.eraseIdx ↑idx2)
⊢ ∀ {idx1 : Fin (x :: l₁✝).length} {idx2 : Fin (x :: l₂✝).length},
    (x :: l₁✝)[idx1] = (x :: l₂✝)[idx2] → ((x :: l₁✝).eraseIdx ↑idx1).Perm ((x :: l₂✝).eraseIdx ↑idx2)

failed_attempts:
succ i2 => simp at h; simp [h]; exact (l1.trans (List.perm_middle ..)).cons_inv
          | succ i1 =>
            cases i2 using Fin.cases with
            | zero => simp at h; simp [←h]; exact (l1.symm.trans (List.perm_middle ..)).cons_inv.symm
            | succ i2 => simp at h; simp; exact (l2 h).cons x
        | swap x y l =>
          intro i1 i2 h
          apply List.Perm.cons_inv (x := (y::x::l)[i1])
          rw [←h]
          exact (List.perm_middle ..).symm.trans ((List.Perm.swap x y l).trans (List.perm_middle ..))
        | trans h1 _ ih1 ih2 =>
          intro i1 i3 h
          have ⟨i2, h2⟩ := List.mem_iff_get.1 (h1.mem_iff.1 (List.get_mem ..))
          exact (ih1 h2).trans (ih2 (h2.symm.trans h))

swap x y l =>
          intro idx1 idx2 h
          apply (List.Perm.cons_inv (x := (y :: x :: l)[idx1])).1
          rw [← h, ← List.perm_cons_erase idx1, h, ← List.perm_cons_erase idx2]
          exact List.Perm.swap x y l
        | trans h1 h2 ih1 ih2 =>
          intro idx1 idx3 h
          obtain ⟨idx2, h2⟩ := in_list_idx (list_perm_in h1 _ (List.mem_iff_get.2 ⟨idx1, rfl⟩))
          exact (ih1 h2.symm).trans (ih2 (h2.trans h))

simp [List.count_eraseIdx, h, (l1.cons x).count_eq]
        | swap x y l =>
          intro i1 i2 h
          apply List.perm_of_count_eq; intro z
          simp [List.count_eraseIdx, h, (List.Perm.swap x y l).count_eq]
        | trans h1 h2 ih1 ih2 =>
          intro i1 i3 h
          let ⟨i2, hi2⟩ := List.mem_iff_get.1 (h1.mem_iff.1 (List.get_mem _ i1))
          exact (ih1 hi2.symm).trans (ih2 (hi2.symm.trans h))

simp; exact l1
          | ⟨0, _⟩, ⟨j + 1, _⟩ =>
            simp at h ⊢; rw [h]
            exact l1.trans (List.perm_cons_eraseIdx _ _)
          | ⟨i + 1, _⟩, ⟨0, _⟩ =>
            simp at h ⊢; rw [← h]
            exact (List.perm_cons_eraseIdx _ _).symm.trans l1
          | ⟨i + 1, _⟩, ⟨j + 1, _⟩ =>
            simp at h ⊢; exact (l2 h).cons x

simpa using l1
          | ⟨0, _⟩, ⟨j + 1, hj⟩ =>
            simp at h ⊢; rw [h]
            exact l1.trans (List.perm_cons_eraseIdx _ ⟨j, hj⟩)
          | ⟨i + 1, hi⟩, ⟨0, _⟩ =>
            simp at h ⊢; rw [←h]
            exact (List.perm_cons_eraseIdx _ ⟨i, hi⟩).symm.trans l1
          | ⟨i + 1, hi⟩, ⟨j + 1, hj⟩ =>
            simp at h ⊢; exact (l2 h).cons x

simp_all
          · exact l1
          · exact l1.trans (List.perm_cons_eraseIdx _ _).symm
          · exact (List.perm_cons_eraseIdx _ _).trans l1
          · exact (l2 heq).cons x
        | swap x y l =>
          intro idx1 idx2 heq
          cases idx1 using Fin.cases <;> cases idx2 using Fin.cases <;> simp_all
          · cases idx2 using Fin.cases <;> simp_all; exact (List.perm_cons_eraseIdx _ _).trans (List.Perm.swap _ _ _)
          · cases idx1 using Fin.cases <;> simp_all; exact (List.perm_cons_eraseIdx _ _).symm.trans (List.Perm.swap _ _ _)
          · apply List.Perm.swap
        | trans h1 h2 ih1 ih2 =>
          intro idx1 idx2 heq
          obtain ⟨idx3, heq3⟩ := in_list_idx (list_perm_in h1 (List.getElem_mem _ _ _))
          exact (ih1 heq3).trans (ih2 (heq3.symm.trans heq))

exact hPerm
          | ⟨i + 1, hi⟩, ⟨j + 1, hj⟩ => exact (ih (by simpa using heq)).cons x
          | ⟨0, _⟩, ⟨j + 1, hj⟩ => exact hPerm.trans (by simpa [← heq] using (List.perm_eraseIdx_erase _ _ _).symm)
          | ⟨i + 1, hi⟩, ⟨0, _⟩ => exact (by simpa [heq] using List.perm_eraseIdx_erase _ _ _).trans hPerm

exact h
          | ⟨0, _⟩, ⟨j+1, hj⟩ =>
            simp at heq; subst heq; exact h.trans (List.perm_get_cons_eraseIdx ⟨j, hj⟩).symm
          | ⟨i+1, hi⟩, ⟨0, _⟩ =>
            simp at heq; subst heq; exact (List.perm_get_cons_eraseIdx ⟨i, hi⟩).trans h
          | ⟨i+1, hi⟩, ⟨j+1, hj⟩ =>
            simp at heq; exact (IH heq).cons x
        | swap x y l =>
          intro i j heq
          apply List.Perm.cons_inv (a := (x :: y :: l)[i])
          exact (List.perm_get_cons_eraseIdx i).symm.trans ((List.Perm.swap x y l).trans (by rw [heq]; exact List.perm_get_cons_eraseIdx j))
        | trans h1 h2 IH1 IH2 =>
          intro i k heq
          obtain ⟨j, hj, h⟩ := List.exists_getElem_of_mem (h1.mem_iff.mp (List.mem_iff_get.mpr ⟨i.1, i.2, rfl⟩))
          exact (IH1 h).trans (IH2 (by rwa [h]))

succ i => exact (ih i).trans (List.Perm.swap _ _ _)
          exact (List.Perm.cons_iff _).1 ((hP idx1).symm.trans ((List.Perm.cons x l1).trans (heq ▸ hP idx2)))
        | swap x y l =>
          intro idx1 idx2 heq
          let hP {l : List α} (i : Fin l.length) : List.Perm l (l[i] :: l.eraseIdx i) := by
            induction l with | nil => exact i.elim0 | cons x l ih =>
            cases i using Fin.cases with | zero => exact List.Perm.refl _ | succ i => exact (ih i).trans (List.Perm.swap _ _ _)
          exact (List.Perm.cons_iff _).1 ((hP idx1).symm.trans ((List.Perm.swap x y l).trans (heq ▸ hP idx2)))
        | trans p1 p2 ih1 ih2 =>
          intro idx1 idx3 heq
          have ⟨idx2, h2⟩ := in_list_idx (list_perm_in p1 _ (List.getElem_mem idx1.2))
          exact (ih1 h2).trans (ih2 (h2.symm.trans heq))

swap x y l =>
          intro i1 i2 heq
          exact ((List.perm_cons_eraseIdx _ i1).symm.trans ((List.Perm.swap x y l).trans (List.perm_cons_eraseIdx _ i2))).of_cons
        | trans h1 h2 IH1 IH2 =>
          intro i1 i3 heq
          let ⟨i2, h12⟩ := List.mem_iff_getElem.1 (list_perm_in h1 _ (List.getElem_mem _ i1.1 i1.2))
          exact (IH1 i1 i2 h12.symm).trans (IH2 i2 i3 (by rwa [h12] at heq))

simp only [List.eraseIdx_cons_succ]; exact IH h
          | ⟨0, _⟩, ⟨j + 1, hj⟩ => simp only [List.eraseIdx_cons_zero, List.eraseIdx_cons_succ]; rw [h]; exact hPerm.trans (hp ⟨j, Nat.lt_of_succ_lt_succ hj⟩).symm
          | ⟨i + 1, hi⟩, ⟨0, _⟩ => simp only [List.eraseIdx_cons_zero, List.eraseIdx_cons_succ]; rw [← h]; exact (hp ⟨i, Nat.lt_of_succ_lt_succ hi⟩).trans hPerm

simp at h_eq ⊢
            exact l1.trans ((List.perm_append_comm _ _).trans (List.Perm.cons _ (List.perm_append_comm _ _)))
          | ⟨i+1, hi⟩, ⟨0, _⟩ =>
            simp at h_eq ⊢
            exact ((List.perm_append_comm _ _).trans (List.Perm.cons _ (List.perm_append_comm _ _))).symm.trans l1
          | ⟨i+1, hi⟩, ⟨j+1, hj⟩ =>
            simp at h_eq ⊢; exact (l2 h_eq).cons x

simp at h ⊢; rw [h]; exact l1.trans (List.perm_middle (as := _))
          | ⟨i+1, _⟩, ⟨0, _⟩ =>
            simp at h ⊢; rw [←h]; exact (List.perm_middle (as := _)).symm.trans l1
          | ⟨i+1, _⟩, ⟨j+1, _⟩ =>
            simp at h ⊢; exact (l2 h).cons x
        | swap x y l =>
          intro i j h
          have h1 := List.perm_middle (as := (x::y::l).take i) (bs := (x::y::l).drop (i+1)) (a := (x::y::l)[i])
          have h2 := List.perm_middle (as := (y::x::l).take j) (bs := (y::x::l).drop (j+1)) (a := (y::x::l)[j])
          have h3 := h1.symm.trans ((List.Perm.swap x y l).trans h2)
          rw [h] at h3; exact List.Perm.of_cons h3
        | trans h1 h2 IH1 IH2 =>
          intro i j h
          obtain ⟨k, hk⟩ := in_list_idx (list_perm_in h1 _ (List.getElem_mem ..))
          exact (IH1 hk).trans (IH2 (hk.symm.trans h))

swap x y l =>
          intro i1 i2 heq
          exact List.Perm.cons_inv (heq ▸ ((List.perm_cons_eraseIdx _ i1).symm.trans ((List.Perm.swap x y l).trans (List.perm_cons_eraseIdx _ i2))))
        | trans h1 h2 ih1 ih2 =>
          intro i1 i2 heq
          let ⟨i', hi'⟩ := in_list_idx (list_perm_in h1 _ (List.mem_iff_get.mpr ⟨i1, rfl⟩))
          exact (ih1 hi'.symm).trans (ih2 (hi'.trans heq))

simp; exact l1
          | ⟨0, _⟩, ⟨j+1, _⟩ => simp at hEq ⊢; rw [hEq]; exact l1.trans (List.perm_cons_eraseIdx _ j)
          | ⟨i+1, _⟩, ⟨0, _⟩ => simp at hEq ⊢; rw [← hEq]; exact (List.perm_cons_eraseIdx _ i).symm.trans l1
          | ⟨i+1, _⟩, ⟨j+1, _⟩ => simp at hEq ⊢; exact List.Perm.cons x (l2 hEq)

sorry

        | trans h1 h2 ih1 ih2 =>

          exact (ih1 hj).trans (ih2 (hj.symm.trans heq))

simp only [List.eraseIdx_cons_zero]; exact l1
          | ⟨0, _⟩, ⟨j + 1, hj⟩ =>
            simp only [List.getElem_cons_zero, List.getElem_cons_succ, List.eraseIdx_cons_zero, List.eraseIdx_cons_succ] at heq ⊢
            rw [heq]; exact l1.trans (p _ ⟨j, Nat.lt_of_succ_lt_succ hj⟩)
          | ⟨i + 1, hi⟩, ⟨0, _⟩ =>
            simp only [List.getElem_cons_succ, List.getElem_cons_zero, List.eraseIdx_cons_succ, List.eraseIdx_cons_zero] at heq ⊢
            rw [←heq]; exact (p _ ⟨i, Nat.lt_of_succ_lt_succ hi⟩).symm.trans l1
          | ⟨i + 1, hi⟩, ⟨j + 1, hj⟩ =>
            simp only [List.getElem_cons_succ, List.eraseIdx_cons_succ] at heq ⊢
            exact (l2 heq).cons x

simp; exact h
          | ⟨0, _⟩, ⟨j+1, hj⟩ => simp at heq; simp [heq]; exact h.trans (List.perm_cons_erase hj).symm
          | ⟨i+1, hi⟩, ⟨0, _⟩ => simp at heq; simp [←heq]; exact (List.perm_cons_erase hi).trans h
          | ⟨i+1, hi⟩, ⟨j+1, hj⟩ => simp at *; exact (ih heq).cons x
        | swap a b l =>
          intro i1 i2 heq
          match i1, i2 with
          | ⟨0, _⟩, ⟨0, _⟩ | ⟨1, _⟩, ⟨1, _⟩ | ⟨0, _⟩, ⟨1, _⟩ | ⟨1, _⟩, ⟨0, _⟩ =>
            simp at heq; subst heq; (first | exact List.Perm.refl _ | exact List.Perm.swap a b l)
          | ⟨i+2, hi⟩, ⟨j+2, hj⟩ => simp at heq; simp [heq]; exact List.Perm.swap a b _
          | ⟨0, _⟩, ⟨j+2, hj⟩ => simp at heq; simp [heq]; exact (List.Perm.swap a b l).trans (List.Perm.cons b (List.perm_cons_erase hj).symm)
          | ⟨1, _⟩, ⟨j+2, hj⟩ => simp at heq; simp [heq]; exact List.Perm.cons a (List.perm_cons_erase hj).symm
          | ⟨i+2, hi⟩, ⟨0, _⟩ => simp at heq; simp [←heq]; exact (List.Perm.cons b (List.perm_cons_erase hi)).trans (List.Perm.swap a b l)
          | ⟨i+2, hi⟩, ⟨1, _⟩ => simp at heq; simp [←heq]; exact List.Perm.cons a (List.perm_cons_erase hi)
        | trans _ _ =>
          intro i1 i2 heq
          rename_i h1 h2 ih1 ih2
          let ⟨i3, heq3⟩ := in_list_idx (list_perm_in h1 _ (List.mem_iff_get.mpr ⟨i1, rfl⟩))
          exact (ih1 heq3).trans (ih2 (heq3.symm.trans heq))

simpa using l1
          | ⟨i + 1, hi⟩, ⟨j + 1, hj⟩ => simpa using l2 h
          | ⟨0, _⟩, ⟨j + 1, hj⟩ =>
            simp at h ⊢; rw [h]
            have : l₂✝.Perm (l₂✝[j] :: l₂✝.eraseIdx j) := by
              rw [←List.take_append_drop j l₂✝, List.eraseIdx_eq_take_drop]
              exact List.perm_append_comm.trans (by simp)
            exact l1.trans this
          | ⟨i + 1, hi⟩, ⟨0, _⟩ =>
            simp at h ⊢; rw [←h]
            have : (l₁✝[i] :: l₁✝.eraseIdx i).Perm l₁✝ := by
              rw [←List.take_append_drop i l₁✝, List.eraseIdx_eq_take_drop]
              exact List.perm_append_comm.trans (by simp) |>.symm
            exact this.trans l1

simp only [List.eraseIdx_cons_zero]
            exact l1
          | ⟨0, _⟩, ⟨j + 1, hj⟩ =>
            simp only [List.getElem_cons_zero, List.getElem_cons_succ, List.eraseIdx_cons_zero, List.eraseIdx_cons_succ] at *
            rw [heq]; exact l1.trans (List.perm_cons_eraseIdx ⟨j, by simpa using hj⟩).symm
          | ⟨i + 1, hi⟩, ⟨0, _⟩ =>
            simp only [List.getElem_cons_zero, List.getElem_cons_succ, List.eraseIdx_cons_zero, List.eraseIdx_cons_succ] at *
            rw [←heq]; exact (List.perm_cons_eraseIdx ⟨i, by simpa using hi⟩).trans l1
          | ⟨i + 1, hi⟩, ⟨j + 1, hj⟩ =>
            simp only [List.getElem_cons_succ, List.eraseIdx_cons_succ] at *
            exact (l2 heq).cons x

swap x y l =>
          intro idx1 idx2 h; apply List.Perm.cons_inv (x := _[idx1]); rw [h]
          exact (List.perm_eraseIdx _ idx1).symm.trans ((List.Perm.swap x y l).trans (List.perm_eraseIdx _ idx2))
        | trans h1 h2 _ _ =>
          intro idx1 idx2 h; apply List.Perm.cons_inv (x := _[idx1]); rw [h]
          exact (List.perm_eraseIdx _ idx1).symm.trans ((h1.trans h2).trans (List.perm_eraseIdx _ idx2))

simp [List.eraseIdx] at h ⊢; rw [h]
            exact List.Perm.trans l1 (List.Perm.cons_eraseIdx _ _)
          | ⟨i+1, h1⟩, ⟨0, _⟩ =>
            simp [List.eraseIdx] at h ⊢; rw [← h]
            exact List.Perm.trans (List.Perm.cons_eraseIdx _ _).symm l1
          | ⟨i1+1, h1⟩, ⟨i2+1, h2⟩ =>
            simp [List.eraseIdx] at h ⊢; exact List.Perm.cons x (l2 h)

succ idx2 =>
              simp at heq ⊢; rw [heq]
              exact l1.trans (List.perm_cons_eraseIdx idx2).symm
          | succ idx1 =>
            cases idx2 using Fin.cases with
            | zero =>
              simp at heq ⊢; rw [←heq]
              exact (List.perm_cons_eraseIdx idx1).symm.trans l1
            | succ idx2 =>
              simp at heq ⊢
              exact (l2 heq).cons x

simp [List.eraseIdx]; exact l1
            | succ j =>
              simp [List.eraseIdx] at h ⊢
              exact l1.trans (h ▸ List.perm_getElem_cons_eraseIdx _ j.val j.isLt).symm
          | succ i =>
            cases idx2 using Fin.cases with
            | zero =>
              simp [List.eraseIdx] at h ⊢
              exact (h ▸ List.perm_getElem_cons_eraseIdx _ i.val i.isLt).trans l1
            | succ j =>
              simp [List.eraseIdx] at h ⊢
              exact (l2 h).cons x

simp_all [List.getElem_cons_zero, List.getElem_cons_succ, List.eraseIdx_cons_zero, List.eraseIdx_cons_succ]
            exact l1.trans (List.perm_cons_erase ⟨j, _⟩).symm
          | ⟨i+1, hi⟩, ⟨0, _⟩ =>
            simp_all [List.getElem_cons_zero, List.getElem_cons_succ, List.eraseIdx_cons_zero, List.eraseIdx_cons_succ]
            exact (List.perm_cons_erase ⟨i, _⟩).trans l1
          | ⟨i+1, hi⟩, ⟨j+1, hj⟩ =>
            simp_all [List.getElem_cons_succ, List.eraseIdx_cons_succ]
            exact (l2 e).cons x
        | swap x y l =>
          intro i1 i2 e
          match i1, i2 with
          | ⟨0, _⟩, ⟨0, _⟩ | ⟨1, _⟩, ⟨1, _⟩ | ⟨0, _⟩, ⟨1, _⟩ | ⟨1, _⟩, ⟨0, _⟩ =>
            simp_all [List.getElem_cons_zero, List.getElem_cons_succ, List.eraseIdx_cons_zero, List.eraseIdx_cons_succ]
            try (subst e); apply List.Perm.refl
          | ⟨i+2, _⟩, ⟨j+2, _⟩ =>
            simp_all [List.getElem_cons_succ, List.eraseIdx_cons_succ]
            exact List.Perm.swap x y _
          | ⟨0, _⟩, ⟨j+2, _⟩ =>
            simp_all [List.getElem_cons_zero, List.getElem_cons_succ, List.eraseIdx_cons_zero, List.eraseIdx_cons_succ]
            exact (List.perm_cons_erase ⟨j, _⟩).cons y |>.trans (List.Perm.swap y x _)
          | ⟨1, _⟩, ⟨j+2, _⟩ =>
            simp_all [List.getElem_cons_zero, List.getElem_cons_succ, List.eraseIdx_cons_zero, List.eraseIdx_cons_succ]
            exact (List.perm_cons_erase ⟨j, _⟩).cons x
          | ⟨i+2, _⟩, ⟨0, _⟩ =>
            simp_all [List.getElem_cons_zero, List.getElem_cons_succ, List.eraseIdx_cons_zero, List.eraseIdx_cons_succ]
            exact (List.Perm.swap x y _).trans ((List.perm_cons_erase ⟨i, _⟩).cons x).symm
          | ⟨i+2, _⟩, ⟨1, _⟩ =>
            simp_all [List.getElem_cons_zero, List.getElem_cons_succ, List.eraseIdx_cons_zero, List.eraseIdx_cons_succ]
            exact ((List.perm_cons_erase ⟨i, _⟩).cons y).symm
        | trans h1 h2 ih1 ih2 =>
          intro i1 i3 e
          obtain ⟨i2, e2⟩ := List.exists_mem_get_of_mem (List.perm_mem_iff h1 |>.1 (List.getElem_mem i1))
          exact (ih1 e2).trans (ih2 (e2.symm.trans e))

simp [List.eraseIdx_zero]; exact l1
          | ⟨0, _⟩, ⟨i2 + 1, hi2⟩ =>
            simp at heq ⊢; rw [heq]; exact l1.trans (List.perm_cons_erase ⟨i2, by simpa using hi2⟩)
          | ⟨i1 + 1, hi1⟩, ⟨0, _⟩ =>
            simp at heq ⊢; rw [←heq]; exact (List.perm_cons_erase ⟨i1, by simpa using hi1⟩).symm.trans l1
          | ⟨i1 + 1, hi1⟩, ⟨i2 + 1, hi2⟩ =>
            simp at heq ⊢; exact (l2 heq).cons x

exact h1
          | ⟨0, _⟩, ⟨j+1, hj⟩ =>
            simp at h ⊢; rw [h]
            exact h1.trans (List.perm_cons_eraseIdx _ ⟨j, by simpa using hj⟩)
          | ⟨i+1, hi⟩, ⟨0, _⟩ =>
            simp at h ⊢; rw [←h]
            exact (List.perm_cons_eraseIdx l1 ⟨i, by simpa using hi⟩).symm.trans h1
          | ⟨i+1, hi⟩, ⟨j+1, hj⟩ =>
            simp at h ⊢; exact (l2 h).cons x

by
          intro i1 i2 h
          let rec f {l : List α} (i : Fin l.length) : (l[i] :: l.eraseIdx i).Perm l :=
            match l, i with
            | _::_, ⟨0, _⟩ => .refl _
            | _::_, ⟨k+1, hk⟩ => ((f ⟨k, Nat.lt_of_succ_lt_succ hk⟩).cons _).trans (.swap _ _ _)
          match i1, i2 with
          | ⟨0, _⟩, ⟨0, _⟩ => exact l1
          | ⟨j1+1, h1⟩, ⟨0, _⟩ => simp at h ⊢; exact (h ▸ f ⟨j1, Nat.lt_of_succ_lt_succ h1⟩).trans l1
          | ⟨0, _⟩, ⟨j2+1, h2⟩ => simp at h ⊢; exact l1.trans (h ▸ f ⟨j2, Nat.lt_of_succ_lt_succ h2⟩).symm
          | ⟨j1+1, h1⟩, ⟨j2+1, h2⟩ => simp at h ⊢; exact (l2 (idx1 := ⟨j1, Nat.lt_of_succ_lt_succ h1⟩) (idx2 := ⟨j2, Nat.lt_of_succ_lt_succ h2⟩) h).cons x

simp at heq ⊢; rw [heq, ← List.take_getElem_drop j (by simpa)]
            exact l1.trans List.perm_middle
          | ⟨i+1, hi⟩, ⟨0, _⟩ =>
            simp at heq ⊢; rw [← heq, ← List.take_getElem_drop i (by simpa)]
            exact List.perm_middle.symm.trans l1
          | ⟨i+1, hi⟩, ⟨j+1, hj⟩ =>
            simp at heq ⊢; exact (l2 heq).cons x

exact hPerm
          | ⟨0, _⟩, ⟨j+1, hj⟩ =>
            simp at heq; simp; rw [heq]
            exact hPerm.trans (List.perm_cons_erase ⟨j, Nat.lt_of_succ_lt_succ hj⟩).symm
          | ⟨i+1, hi⟩, ⟨0, _⟩ =>
            simp at heq; simp; rw [← heq]
            exact (List.perm_cons_erase ⟨i, Nat.lt_of_succ_lt_succ hi⟩).trans hPerm
          | ⟨i+1, hi⟩, ⟨j+1, hj⟩ =>
            simp at heq; simp; exact (IH heq).cons x
        | swap x y l =>
          intro idx1 idx2 heq
          have h := (List.perm_cons_erase idx1).trans (List.Perm.swap x y l)
          exact List.perm_cons_iff.1 (heq ▸ h.trans (List.perm_cons_erase idx2).symm)
        | trans h1 h2 IH1 IH2 =>
          intro idx1 idx3 heq
          let ⟨idx2, h2⟩ := in_list_idx (list_perm_in h1 _ (List.getElem_mem l1 idx1.1 idx1.2))
          exact (IH1 h2).trans (IH2 (h2.symm.trans heq))

simpa using heq.symm)).symm
          | ⟨i+1, hi⟩, ⟨0, _⟩ =>
            exact (List.perm_cons_eraseIdx ⟨i, hi⟩ (by simpa using heq)).trans l1
          | ⟨i+1, hi⟩, ⟨j+1, hj⟩ =>
            exact (l2 (by simpa using heq)).cons x
        | swap x y l => fun i1 i2 e => (List.Perm.swap x y l).eraseIdx i1 i2 e
        | trans h1 h2 ih1 ih2 => fun i1 i3 e =>
          let ⟨i2, e2⟩ := h1.exists_mem_get i1
          (ih1 e2).trans (ih2 (e2.symm.trans e))

simp [List.eraseIdx] at hEq ⊢; subst hEq; exact hPerm.trans (List.perm_append_comm _ _ |>.trans (by simp; rfl)).symm
          | ⟨i+1, _⟩, ⟨0, _⟩ => simp [List.eraseIdx] at hEq ⊢; subst hEq; exact (List.perm_append_comm _ _ |>.trans (by simp; rfl)).trans hPerm
        | swap x y l =>
          intro i j hEq
          match i, j with
          | ⟨0, _⟩, ⟨1, _⟩ | ⟨1, _⟩, ⟨0, _⟩ => simp [List.eraseIdx]; rfl
          | ⟨0, _⟩, ⟨0, _⟩ | ⟨1, _⟩, ⟨1, _⟩ => simp [List.eraseIdx] at hEq; subst hEq; rfl
          | ⟨i+2, _⟩, ⟨j+2, _⟩ => simp [List.eraseIdx] at hEq ⊢; exact (.swap x y _).trans (by simp; rfl)
          | ⟨0, _⟩, ⟨j+2, _⟩ => simp [List.eraseIdx] at hEq ⊢; subst hEq; exact (.swap y x _).trans (.cons y (List.perm_append_comm _ _ |>.trans (by simp; rfl)).symm)
          | ⟨i+2, _⟩, ⟨0, _⟩ => simp [List.eraseIdx] at hEq ⊢; subst hEq; exact (.cons x (List.perm_append_comm _ _ |>.trans (by simp; rfl))).trans (.swap x y _)
          | ⟨1, _⟩, ⟨j+2, _⟩ => simp [List.eraseIdx] at hEq ⊢; subst hEq; exact (.swap x y _).trans (.cons x (List.perm_append_comm _ _ |>.trans (by simp; rfl)).symm)
          | ⟨i+2, _⟩, ⟨1, _⟩ => simp [List.eraseIdx] at hEq ⊢; subst hEq; exact (.cons y (List.perm_append_comm _ _ |>.trans (by simp; rfl))).trans (.swap y x _)
        | trans h1 h2 IH1 IH2 =>
          intro i1 i3 hEq
          obtain ⟨i2, hi2⟩ := in_list_idx (list_perm_in h1 _ (List.mem_iff_get.mpr ⟨i1.1, i1.2, rfl⟩))
          exact (IH1 hi2).trans (IH2 (hi2.symm.trans hEq))
